subject: I made this for you. [Time money system]
body:
Time is the only resource we're given. The people who make the most money know how to trade it for the highest return.

I wrote this on how I run my time. It's ruthlessly simple. It's also how we run the teams at Acquisition.com.

If you like my writing, and like making money, you will love this.

Time is money,

Alex Hormozi
